text.title: Django Services Layer Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example applying the methodology to a representative input. Output matches the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

section.title: Trace
section.paragraph: View POST /orders/ accepts payload, creates Order + OrderLine + AuditLog, then sends confirmation email. Extract into order_create(*, user: User, items: list[dict], notes: str | None = None) -> Order. Wrap in @transaction.atomic because 3 writes. Replace send_email.delay(order.id) with transaction.on_commit(lambda: send_email.delay(order.id)). View becomes a 4-line dispatch.

section.title: Decision path applied
section.paragraph: The decision tree in content/06-decision-tree.xml routed this input to the recommended action. Each rule referenced by the conclusion is listed in content/01-core-rules.xml.
